concerns.text: FR-001 (frozen encoder selection) and FR-007 (6h runtime limit) lack explicit tasks. T011 implements 'distil-whisper' but no task exists to verify the 6h runtime constraint (FR-007) or to handle the fallback if 'distil-whisper' fails CPU verification (FR-001 flexibility).

FR-003 (stratified 80/20 split) is mentioned in T015 description but lacks a dedicated task to implement/verify the stratification logic explicitly. T015 says 'perform stratified split' but no task ensures this is tested or logged as a distinct step for SC-001/SC-003 traceability.

SC-003 (Statistical significance p < 0.05) is not explicitly covered by a task. T018 implements McNemar's test, but no task explicitly documents the 'p < 0.05' threshold check or the pass/fail logic required to satisfy SC-003's measurable outcome.

FR-005 (Threshold sweep {0.3, 0.4, 0.5, 0.6, 0.7}) is partially covered by T020, but T020 mentions 'Unit test with synthetic data' and T022 mentions 'Real Data'. There is no explicit task to generate the specific report showing the variation for the EXACT set {0.3, 0.4, 0.5, 0.6, 0.7} as mandated by FR-005, distinct from the general sensitivity analysis.

FR-007 (6h runtime limit) is not explicitly tested. T027 runs the pipeline on CI but does not explicitly include a task to assert/verify the runtime is ≤ 6h as a pass/fail condition for the requirement.

T014a is tagged [US1] but the description says 'AFTER successful dataset download'. This creates a dependency ambiguity. While the plan moves schema generation to Phase 1, the task placement in Phase 3 (US1) without a clear 'depends on T009' marker or explicit 'Phase 1' tag might confuse the execution order relative to the plan's Phase 1 output requirement.
